Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of Two Minors.
Off Calendar Jan-12-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared for petitioner Audrey T. Leslie, the Guardian Ad Litem for the minor, Jelani Leslie.
Neither petitioner nor the minor were present at today's hearing.
Order waiving the appearance of petitioner and the minor at today's hearing was filed January 11, 2010.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $12,916.05.
Attorney's Fees - $3,074.05.
Costs - $619.85.

The net balance of $9,222.15 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Community Resource Credit Union, located at 2900 Decker Drive, Baytown, Texas. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Additionally, future settlements from defendants in this action may be accepted by petitioner Audrey Leslie, as Guardian Ad Litem of Jelani Leslie, and that 10% of the net settlements shall be distributed pursuant to this Order.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.
